sections_cited: Section 143 of Sindh Local Government Act

chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-72 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 31.10.2025. Mr. Muhammad Umar Panhwar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Barrister Asad Ahmed, for Karachi Institute of Heart Diseases / KMC. Ms. Saima Imdad, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ------------------------------------ Per Counsel for Respondent No.3/KMC petitioner has an alternate remedy before the Sindh Councils (Appeals) Rules, 1982 under Section 143 of Sindh Local Government Act, 2013 r/w Rule 4 of the Sindh Councils (Appeals) Rules, 1982. As such the petitioner first exhaust his alternate remedy. Accordingly this petition is not maintainable and is hereby dismissed being not maintainable alongwith pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
